CustomField.description: Belgium Customer Care - requirement from the word doc
CustomField.formula:
IF(Text(Contact.Language__c)='fre' && TEXT(Account.Identification_Criteria__c) = '300002', $Label.BEL_Sentence1_French ,
IF(Text(Contact.Language__c)='dut' && TEXT(Account.Identification_Criteria__c) = '300002', $Label.BEL_Sentence1_Dutch ,
IF(Text(Contact.Language__c)='eng' && TEXT(Account.Identification_Criteria__c) = '300002', $Label.BEL_Sentence1_English,
'')) )
CustomField.label: Bel-Marketing Line 1
